statements.sql: select * from `admins` where `id` = 1 limit 1

select `products`.*, (select count(*) from `reviews` where `products`.`id` = `reviews`.`product_id` and `delivery_man_id` is null) as `reviews_count`, (select avg(`reviews`.`rating`) from `reviews` where `products`.`id` = `reviews`.`product_id` and `delivery_man_id` is null) as `ratings_average` from `products` where (`added_by` = 'admin') having `reviews_count` > 0 order by `reviews_count` desc

select `products`.*, (select SUM(qty) from `order_details` where `products`.`id` = `order_details`.`product_id` and `delivery_status` = 'delivered') as `total_qty_sold`, (select SUM(price * qty) - SUM(discount) from `order_details` where `products`.`id` = `order_details`.`product_id` and `delivery_status` = 'delivered') as `totalSoldAmount` from `products` where (`added_by` = 'admin') and exists (select * from `order_details` where `products`.`id` = `order_details`.`product_id` and (`delivery_status` = 'delivered') and not exists (select * from `refund_statuses` where `order_details`.`refund_request` = `refund_statuses`.`id` and (`status` = 'approved')))

select `products`.*, (select count(*) from `reviews` where `products`.`id` = `reviews`.`product_id` and `delivery_man_id` is null) as `reviews_count`, (select avg(`reviews`.`rating`) from `reviews` where `products`.`id` = `reviews`.`product_id` and `delivery_man_id` is null) as `ratings_average` from `products` where (`added_by` = 'seller' and `request_status` = 1) having `reviews_count` > 0 order by `reviews_count` desc

select `products`.*, (select SUM(qty) from `order_details` where `products`.`id` = `order_details`.`product_id` and `delivery_status` = 'delivered') as `total_qty_sold`, (select SUM(price * qty) - SUM(discount) from `order_details` where `products`.`id` = `order_details`.`product_id` and `delivery_status` = 'delivered') as `totalSoldAmount` from `products` where (`added_by` = 'seller' and `request_status` = 1) and `request_status` = 1 and exists (select * from `order_details` where `products`.`id` = `order_details`.`product_id` and (`delivery_status` = 'delivered') and not exists (select * from `refund_statuses` where `order_details`.`refund_request` = `refund_statuses`.`id` and (`status` = 'approved')))
select count(*) as aggregate from `users` where `is_active` = 1 and not `email` = 'walking@customer.com'

select `delivery_men`.*, (select count(*) from `reviews` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `reviews`.`delivery_man_id`) as `review_count`, (select avg(`reviews`.`rating`) from `reviews` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `reviews`.`delivery_man_id`) as `review_avg_rating`, (select count(*) from `reviews` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `reviews`.`delivery_man_id`) as `review_count`, (select avg(`reviews`.`rating`) from `reviews` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `reviews`.`delivery_man_id`) as `review_avg_rating`, (select count(*) from `orders` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `orders`.`delivery_man_id` and `order_status` = 'delivered') as `delivered_orders_count` from `delivery_men` where `seller_id` = 0 and exists (select * from `orders` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `orders`.`delivery_man_id` and `order_status` = 'delivered') order by `review_avg_rating` desc
select count(*) as aggregate from `seller_wallets` where exists (select * from `sellers` where `seller_wallets`.`seller_id` = `sellers`.`id`) and `total_earning` > 0

select `sellers`.*, (select count(*) from `products` where `sellers`.`id` = `products`.`user_id` and exists (select * from `wishlists` where `products`.`id` = `wishlists`.`product_id`) and (`added_by` = 'seller')) as `wishlist_count` from `sellers` where exists (select * from `products` where `sellers`.`id` = `products`.`user_id` and `added_by` = 'seller' and exists (select * from `wishlists` where `products`.`id` = `wishlists`.`product_id`) and (`added_by` = 'seller')) order by `wishlist_count` desc
select * from `orders`
select * from `sellers`
select * from `products`
select * from `users` where not `email` = 'walking@customer.com'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'failed'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'pending'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'returned'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'canceled'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'confirmed'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'delivered'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'processing'
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'out_for_delivery'
select * from `admin_wallets` where (`admin_id` = 1) limit 1

select IFNULL(sum(order_amount),0) as sums, YEAR(created_at) year, MONTH(created_at) month,DAY(created_at) day,DAYNAME(created_at) day_of_week from `orders` where (`seller_is` = 'admin' and `payment_status` = 'paid') and `created_at` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-12-31' group by `year`, `month`, `day_of_week`

select IFNULL(sum(order_amount),0) as sums, YEAR(created_at) year, MONTH(created_at) month,DAY(created_at) day,DAYNAME(created_at) day_of_week from `orders` where (`seller_is` = 'seller' and `payment_status` = 'paid') and `created_at` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-12-31' group by `year`, `month`, `day_of_week`

select IFNULL(sum(seller_amount),0) as sums, YEAR(created_at) year, MONTH(created_at) month,DAY(created_at) day,DAYNAME(created_at) day_of_week from `order_transactions` where (`seller_is` = 'admin' and `status` = 'disburse') and `created_at` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-12-31' group by `year`, `month`

select IFNULL(sum(seller_amount),0) as sums, YEAR(created_at) year, MONTH(created_at) month,DAY(created_at) day,DAYNAME(created_at) day_of_week from `order_transactions` where (`seller_is` = 'seller' and `status` = 'disburse') and `created_at` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-12-31' group by `year`, `month`

select IFNULL(sum(admin_commission),0) as sums, YEAR(created_at) year, MONTH(created_at) month,DAY(created_at) day,DAYNAME(created_at) day_of_week from `order_transactions` where (`seller_is` = 'seller' and `status` = 'disburse') and `created_at` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-12-31' group by `year`, `month`
select * from `users` where not `email` = 'walking@customer.com'
select * from `orders`
select `brands`.*, (select count(*) from `products` where `brands`.`id` = `products`.`brand_id`) as `brand_all_products_count` from `brands`
select * from `sellers`
select `delivery_men`.*, (select count(*) from `orders` where `delivery_men`.`id` = `orders`.`delivery_man_id`) as `orders_count` from `delivery_men` where `seller_id` = 0
select * from `orders` where `order_status` = 'pending' order by `id` desc limit 5
select * from `business_settings` where `type` = 'language' limit 1
select * from `admin_roles` where `admin_roles`.`id` = 1 limit 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `order_status` = 'pending'
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `order_status` = 'pending'
select count(*) as aggregate from `contacts` where `seen` = 0
select * from `storages` where `storages`.`data_type` = 'App\\Models\\Admin' and `storages`.`data_id` = 1 and `storages`.`data_id` is not null
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders`
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'pending')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'confirmed')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'processing')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'out_for_delivery')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'delivered')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `order_status` = 'returned'
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'failed')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where (`order_status` = 'canceled')
select count(*) as aggregate from `refund_requests` where exists (select * from `orders` where `refund_requests`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id`) and `status` = 'pending'
select count(*) as aggregate from `refund_requests` where `status` = 'approved'
select count(*) as aggregate from `refund_requests` where `status` = 'refunded'
select count(*) as aggregate from `refund_requests` where `status` = 'rejected'
select * from `products` where (`added_by` = 'admin')
select * from `products` where (`added_by` = 'seller')
select count(*) as aggregate from `contacts` where `seen` = 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `support_tickets` where `status` = 'open'
